ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "date" INTEGER /* Day of the month when the task is due */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the year when the task is due */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year when the task is due */,
  "task_description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the task */,
  "completed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the task is completed (1 for completed, 0 for not completed) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the task (low, medium, high) */,
  "estimated_time" INTEGER /* Estimated time required to complete the task (in minutes) */,
  "actual_time" INTEGER /* Actual time taken to complete the task (in minutes) */,
  "reminder" TEXT /* Date and time of the reminder for the task */,
  "progress" INTEGER /* Progress of the task (0% to 100%) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments related to the task */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the task was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the task was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (null for top-level categories) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color assigned to the category for visual differentiation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reminders" (
  "reminder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reminder */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the task the reminder is associated with */,
  "reminder_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the reminder should be triggered */,
  "reminder_message" TEXT /* Message to be shown when the reminder is triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reminder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reminders_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)
